phrases.intent_en: Ask where the star-shaped vents are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde veo las claraboyas con forma de estrella?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, DON-deh VEH-oh lahs klah-rah-BOH-yahs KOHN FOR-mah deh es-TREH-yah?

likely_response.local: En la cúpula de la Sala Templada, arriba.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH KÚ-poo-lah DEH LAH SAH-lah tehmp-LAH-dah ahr-REE-bah
likely_response.translation_en: Look up in the central room.

responses.english: Look up in the central room.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH KÚ-poo-lah DEH LAH SAH-lah tehmp-LAH-dah ahr-REE-bah
responses.local: En la cúpula de la Sala Templada, arriba.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the entrance to baths is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada a los baños?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah en-TRAH-dah ah lohs BAH-nyohs?

likely_response.local: La entrada está al final del pasillo.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAH ehnt-RAH-dah EHSTÁ AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
likely_response.translation_en: The entrance is at the end of the hallway.

responses.english: The entrance is at the end of the hallway.
responses.phonetic: LAH ehnt-RAH-dah EHSTÁ AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
responses.local: La entrada está al final del pasillo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cold water room is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la sala fría?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah SAH-lah FREE-ah?

likely_response.local: Está al fondo, a la izquierda del vestuario.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHSTÁ AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah DEHL beh-stoo-ah-REE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: It is at the back, to the left of the locker room.

responses.english: It is at the back, to the left of the locker room.
responses.phonetic: EHSTÁ AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah DEHL beh-stoo-ah-REE-oh
responses.local: Está al fondo, a la izquierda del vestuario.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿está permitido tomar fotografías en el interior?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿eh-STAH per-mee-TEE-doh toh-MAHR foh-toh-grah-FEE-ahs en el een-teh-ree-OHR?

likely_response.local: Sí, sin flash en las salas termales.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ SEEN FLAHS EHN LAHS SAH-lahs tehr-MAH-lehs
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, but without flash or tripods in the rooms.

responses.english: Yes, but without flash or tripods in the rooms.
responses.phonetic: SÍ SEEN FLAHS EHN LAHS SAH-lahs tehr-MAH-lehs
responses.local: Sí, sin flash en las salas termales.
